text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Who's the star of the show?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan's Friends
text_block_list.text: Tosen Jordan!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Who do you stan?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan's Friends
text_block_list.text: Tosen Jordan!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Aaaand... What're the trending words of the day?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan's Friends
text_block_list.text: Congratulations on getting into Tracen, Jordan!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, thank you! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ding.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
All done. I'll upload this to UmaTok... later. Right now, I wanna dig
into this burger!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan's Friend A
text_block_list.text: Back to off-camera Jordan again, I see.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, come on. You know my mom hates it when I eat junk food. And
I'm high-key starving. ...Whoa, what's with those nails?! Absolute slay!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan's Friend A
text_block_list.text:
I know, right? This salon only charges 1,500 yen to first-time visitors.
I got a coupon to give to a friend, so here. Congrats on getting into
Tracen.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Whoa, you shouldn't have... But I'm glad you did. Love you, bestie.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan's Friend A
text_block_list.text: Love you too! Don't let Tracen take away your cute vibes, Jordan.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan's Friend B
text_block_list.text:
For real though, you're breaking up the dream team here... You sure
we can't talk you out of going?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hey, you know how hard I worked to get into this school. Even the teach said something nice about me for once.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan's Friend A
text_block_list.text:
Facts. He was totes shocked. But well, I get it. You're not exactly,
like, the brightest bulb in the box.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan's Friend A
text_block_list.text:
Seriously, how many times did you accidentally throw out your report
card? Or the sports festival signs? You were practically writing a new
apology every month.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hey, it wasn't every month. It was every other month!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan's Friend B
text_block_list.text:
That's still a lot! I'm weak! ...Anyway, we're happy for you. You better
eat it at Tracen, okay? We'll be cheering from the stands.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Yeah, yeah, thanks... And I will. I mean it.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I mean, this is Tracen, right? They should be able to turn even me into a star.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Several months later...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
(This is it, Jordan. You've gotta win... Another loss would be so
cringe. Like, for real.)

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
(Pay attention during the start, and get into a good position. After
that... Keep your pacing in mind!)

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Inhale... Phew... I've got this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In search of a racer to train, I decide to check out the scrimmages.
There, I hear the other trainers talking about one particular
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Wait, isn't that Tosen Jordan? I heard she hurt her toenail and
couldn't run. Is she okay?

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
She might be recovered, but that doesn't mean it's not going to
happen again. From what I've heard, she's already reinjured herself a
few times now.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Still... At least she hasn't given up. I saw her training yesterday, and
she was giving it her all... Though the dead time did set her back a
bit.
choice_data_list: (Tosen Jordan, huh... I wonder what she's like.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As their whispered conversation worms its way into my ears, I turn my
attention to the track.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: The racers have taken their positions... And they're off!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
(Wh-why do my legs feel so wobbly? I need steady movements!
Steady!)

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: (...I can't! The hell's going on? Why's my running so sus?)

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... No!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The leading racers have rounded the fourth corner and are headed
into the final stretch! They're quite a ways from the back of the pack!

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Is Jordan all right? She looks almost... sluggish. She's really trailing
behind the other racers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan's lackluster performance ironically draws all eyes to her.
She finishes in last place, far behind the others.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Did something happen, or did she just... give up? She seemed
like such a hard worker yesterday.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ignoring the trainers' gossip, I decide to follow Tosen Jordan.
Something definitely felt off.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...Dammit!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: That was so! Freakin'! CRIIIINGE!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: What are you looking at?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Compared to her running, the frustration she showed was anything but
lackluster. Even after she runs off, I can't stop thinking about the
strange contradiction I just witnessed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few weeks after that, I begin to hear rumors that Tosen Jordan is
avoiding races.
